item.title: Top 10 Tech & AI — 2026-07-17
item.content:encoded:
1. Quoting Thibault Sottiaux [AI]
    Insights into GPT-5.6's critical file deletion issues are significant.
  2. [AINews] Kimi K3 2.8T-A50B: the largest open model ever released; Opus 4.8-class at Sonnet 5 pricing [AI]
    Kimi K3 is the largest open model with substantial competitive capabilities.
  3. [AINews] Thinky's Inkling: 975B-A41B multimodal, new best American Apache 2.0 open model (with Inkling-Small, 276B-A12B) [AI]
    Inkling's multimodal design breaks new ground in open models.
  4. Google is renaming NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook [AI]
    Google's NotebookLM rebranding to Gemini Notebook reflects strategic AI developments.
  5. Computer cops [AI]
    Regulatory actions against Google highlight increasing scrutiny of AI practices.
  6. It's official: EU will force Google to share search data and open up AI on Android [AI]
    EU's demands on Google reshape competitive landscape for AI services.
  7. Google ordered to open Android and Search to rivals in Europe [AI]
    Europe's mandate to open AI raises essential industry dynamics.
  8. Kimi K3, and what we can still learn from the pelican benchmark [AI]
    Kimi K3’s launch may disrupt existing AI market players.
  9. LM Studio Bionic: the AI agent for open models [Tech]
    LM Studio Bionic's introduction expands the possibilities of model deployment.
  10. Amazon EC2 High Memory U7in-24TB instances now available in AWS Europe (Paris) region [Tech]
    High Memory EC2 instances enhance cloud infrastructure capabilities for demanding applications.

item.title: Top 10 Tech & AI — 2026-07-16
item.content:encoded:
1. Meet GPT-Red: an LLM super-hacker OpenAI built to make its models safer [AI]
    OpenAI's GPT-Red enhances cybersecurity for LLMs, crucial for safe AI development.
  2. OpenAI finally launches hardware… for Codex [AI]
    OpenAI launches Codex Micro, expanding its hardware for coding applications.
  3. How I tricked Claude into leaking your deepest, darkest secrets [AI]
    Security vulnerability in Claude highlights risks in AI systems and data exfiltration.
  4. xAI sues a man for using Grok to generate CSAM ‘deepfakes’ [AI]
    xAI's lawsuit against CSAM generation emphasizes ethical concerns in AI usage.
  5. Amazon Cognito now supports importing users with password hashes [Tech]
    Amazon Cognito's password hash import improves user security and migration processes.
  6. Amazon RDS and Aurora now support R8g and M8g database instances in additional AWS Regions [Tech]
    AWS's Graviton4 instance availability enhances database performance across diverse regions.
  7. Amazon OpenSearch Service now supports the Agent Toolkit for AWS with a curated skill [Tech]
    AI coding agents in OpenSearch Service show integration of AI in data management.
  8. Amazon RDS now supports up to four storage modifications in 24 hours [Tech]
    Amazon RDS's storage modification increase improves database flexibility for users.
  9. Amazon MSK Express Brokers adds support for Apache Kafka version 4.2 [Tech]
    MSK Express Brokers' Kafka upgrade enhances data streaming capabilities for enterprises.
  10. Inkling: Our Open-Weights Model [Tech]
    Open-source models like Inkling promote collaboration and transparency in AI research.

item.title: Top 10 Tech & AI — 2026-07-15
item.content:encoded:
1. Introducing Amazon GuardDuty AI Protection for AWS AI workloads [Tech]
    Enhances security for AI services amid growing adoption of AI technology.
  2. SpaceXAI’s Grok programming tool was uploading its users’ entire codebase to cloud storage [AI]
    Raises significant privacy concerns over user data in AI coding tools.
  3. New York becomes the first state to enact a data center moratorium [AI]
    First state to impose a ban on data center construction affecting AI industry.
  4. Meta accused of using biased AI targeting for mass layoffs [AI]
    Allegations of biased AI targeting in layoffs highlight ethical AI issues.
  5. OpenAI may announce a ChatGPT smart speaker this year [AI]
    OpenAI's potential smart speaker indicates new consumer AI product trends.
  6. AWS Storage Gateway adds console support for copying file shares across gateways [Tech]
    Simplifies migration processes for users, crucial for cloud service efficiency.
  7. AWS Security Hub now provides AI inventory for organization-wide visibility of AI assets [Tech]
    Centralized security view for AI assets enhances enterprise security posture.
  8. Amazon Managed Service for Apache Flink now offers AI Agent Skills to simplify building and operating Flink applications [Tech]
    Aids developers with expert guidance in AI application management.
  9. AWS Lambda console provides a one-click setup prompt for coding agents [Tech]
    Simplifies serverless development, making AWS more accessible for users.
  10. AWS IAM Identity Center achieves FedRAMP Class C Certification [Tech]
    Signifies AWS compliance advancements in security for federal usage.

item.title: Top 10 Tech & AI — 2026-07-14
item.content:encoded:
1. The 6 wildest claims in Apple’s lawsuit against OpenAI [AI]
    Apple's lawsuit against OpenAI raises serious legal and ethical implications for AI development.
  2. What Anthropic’s latest AI discovery does—and doesn’t—show [AI]
    Anthropic's research on LLM interpretability could impact future AI safety and transparency.
  3. Now, defenders are embracing the prompt injection, too [AI]
    Prompt injections expose vulnerabilities in AI systems, threatening security and user data.
  4. Voxtral-Mini-4B-Realtime for real-time speech transcription is now available in Amazon SageMaker JumpStart [Tech]
    Voxtral-Mini-4B enhances real-time speech transcription capabilities for AWS users.
  5. OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna now generally available on Amazon Bedrock [Tech]
    OpenAI GPT-5.6 offers substantial advancements in AI model performance and efficiency.
  6. OpenAI privacy-filter for PII detection and masking is now available in Amazon SageMaker JumpStart [Tech]
    OpenAI's privacy-filter model addresses critical concerns about data protection and PII.
  7. Apple sues OpenAI after ex-engineer allegedly used bug to steal trade secrets [AI]
    Apple's lawsuit for trade secrets showcases the competitive tensions in AI innovation.
  8. Waze is getting a bunch of new AI-powered features [AI]
    Waze's integration of Gemini enhances user experience through AI-powered features.
  9. The fight against AI data centers is just beginning [AI]
    Community opposition to AI data centers highlights broader societal concerns about technology.
  10. [AINews] Codex usage up >10x in 6 months to 7M users, +1M in the past ~day; did Codex overtake Claude Code?? [AI]
    Codex's user growth indicates significant interest in AI tools for coding.

    EU's demands on Meta could reshape social media user engagement and privacy norms.

    sqlite-utils update improves crucial functionality for AI-related database operations.
